_comment: Wave 8 seed list — famous YouTube videos pre-transcribed for SEO landing pages. Mix of TED Talks, long-form podcasts, and viral one-offs per 2026-06-04 decision. URL slug becomes the page path /transcripts/{slug}. Each entry: { videoId, slug, category, title (manual override, optional — provider title used if blank), notes (one-line context shown in the page intro) }. Keep this file as the source of truth for which videos are published; the build script reads it and writes data/transcripts/{slug}.json per entry.
_removed_2026_06_05: u4ZoJKF_VuA (ted-how-great-leaders-inspire-action-simon-sinek) — transcriptapi returned Arabic translation track
arj7oStGLkU (ted-inside-mind-master-procrastinator-tim-urban) — transcriptapi returned Arabic translation track
iCvmsMzlF7o (ted-looks-arent-everything-believe-me-im-a-model-cameron-russell) — transcriptapi returned Albanian translation track

RcGyVTAoXEU (ted-the-happy-secret-to-better-work-shawn-achor) — transcriptapi returned Albanian translation track. YouTube watch-page fetch from local Mac also fails (CAPTIONS_FETCH_FAILED on signed baseUrl). Can re-add when we find a verifiable English source.

videos.title: Do Schools Kill Creativity? — Sir Ken Robinson
videos.notes: The most-watched TED Talk of all time (80M+ views). Sir Ken Robinson on why education systems suppress creative thinking.

videos.title: The Power of Vulnerability — Brené Brown
videos.notes: Brené Brown's 2010 TEDxHouston talk on shame, courage, and connection. ~70M views.

videos.title: Your Body Language May Shape Who You Are — Amy Cuddy
videos.notes: Amy Cuddy's 2012 talk on power posing and the relationship between body language and confidence.

videos.title: The Puzzle of Motivation — Dan Pink
videos.notes: Dan Pink's 2009 TEDGlobal talk on autonomy, mastery, and purpose as drivers of motivation.

videos.title: What Makes a Good Life? Lessons from the Longest Study on Happiness — Robert Waldinger
videos.notes: Robert Waldinger summarizing 75 years of the Harvard Study of Adult Development. Relationships matter more than wealth or fame.

videos.title: Grit: The Power of Passion and Perseverance — Angela Duckworth
videos.notes: Angela Duckworth's 2013 talk introducing 'grit' as a stronger predictor of success than IQ or talent.

videos.title: Elon Musk: SpaceX, Mars, Tesla Autopilot, Self-Driving, Robotics, and AI — Lex Fridman Podcast #252
videos.notes: Long-form Lex Fridman interview with Elon Musk covering space, AI, and Twitter/X. Multi-hour conversation.

videos.title: Toolkit for Sleep — Andrew Huberman
videos.notes: Huberman Lab episode laying out science-based protocols for better sleep, light exposure, and circadian timing.

videos.title: Controlling Your Dopamine for Motivation, Focus & Satisfaction — Andrew Huberman
videos.notes: Huberman Lab on the dopamine system and how to use it to drive motivation without burning out.

videos.title: Naval Ravikant: Happiness, Reducing Anxiety, Crypto, and Aliens — Lex Fridman Podcast
videos.notes: Naval Ravikant on philosophy, building wealth without luck, happiness as a learned skill, and the long now.

videos.title: Derek Sivers — Tim Ferriss Show
videos.notes: Tim Ferriss interviews Derek Sivers on selling CD Baby, philosophy of business, and useful not true beliefs.

videos.title: David Goggins: How to Build Immense Inner Strength — Huberman Lab
videos.notes: Andrew Huberman and David Goggins on building mental toughness, callusing the mind, and the 40% rule.

videos.title: Jordan Peterson: Life, Death, Power, Fame, and Meaning — Lex Fridman Podcast
videos.notes: Lex Fridman and Jordan Peterson covering responsibility, mortality, meaning, and Western philosophy.

videos.title: Jocko Willink: How to Become Resilient, Forge Mental Toughness & Lead Yourself & Others — Huberman Lab
videos.notes: Huberman with Jocko Willink on discipline, ownership, leadership, and recovering from setbacks.

videos.title: Jerry Seinfeld — The Tim Ferriss Show
videos.notes: Tim Ferriss and Jerry Seinfeld on creativity, deliberate writing practice, and consistent execution.

videos.title: Sam Altman: OpenAI, GPT-5, Sora, Board Saga, Elon Musk — Lex Fridman Podcast
videos.notes: Lex interviews Sam Altman on AGI timelines, the OpenAI board reversal, and what's coming after GPT-4.

videos.title: Steve Jobs' 2005 Stanford Commencement Address
videos.notes: Steve Jobs' famous 'stay hungry, stay foolish' commencement speech. Three stories: connecting the dots, love and loss, and death.

videos.title: Martin Luther King Jr. — 'I Have a Dream' Full Speech
videos.notes: The complete 1963 Lincoln Memorial speech. One of the most-cited public addresses in modern history.

videos.title: David Foster Wallace — 'This Is Water' Commencement Speech
videos.notes: DFW's 2005 Kenyon College commencement on real freedom, attention, and the default self.

videos.title: Richard Feynman on Why Magnets Attract — BBC Interview
videos.notes: Feynman's famous 1983 BBC interview on what it means to 'explain' something and the recursion of 'why' questions.

videos.title: Naomi Shihab Nye Reads 'Valentine for Ernest Mann'
videos.notes: Naomi Shihab Nye reads her poem about finding poems in unlikely places. Frequently cited in writing courses.

videos.title: Optimistic Nihilism — Kurzgesagt
videos.notes: Kurzgesagt's most-shared philosophy video: how meaning works in a universe without inherent purpose.

videos.title: What Is Reality? — Vsauce
videos.notes: Vsauce's Michael Stevens on perception, the nature of reality, and what we can actually know.

videos.title: An Antidote to Existential Crisis — Kurzgesagt
videos.notes: Kurzgesagt on cosmic insignificance and why feeling small can be liberating instead of terrifying.

videos.title: Neil deGrasse Tyson — The Most Astounding Fact About the Universe
videos.notes: Neil deGrasse Tyson's viral 90-second answer about stardust and our connectedness to the cosmos.

videos.title: Jim Carrey's Commencement Address at Maharishi University 2014
videos.notes: Jim Carrey's commencement speech: 'You can fail at what you don't want, so you might as well take a chance on doing what you love.'
